name: cipher-brain
description: Encrypt a gbrain snapshot so only the key holder can read it (age X25519). Produces one backend-agnostic ciphertext for censorship-resistant storage.

scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run selftest && npm run selftest:storage && npm run selftest:recovery && npm run selftest:arweave && npm run selftest:arweave-nodeps && bash scripts/cli-smoke.sh
